common_prompt: Start from the trusted preparation head and edit only this component's exact owned_files. Do not edit Cargo.lock, workspace/shared contracts, generated protobuf or schemas, delivery tooling, the ownership policy, sibling authorities, frozen provider implementations, or another component's files. Remove every listed legacy handshake and fallback, add focused tests and service/runtime documentation, and run the trusted candidate ownership check before handoff. The check requires clean worktrees, disables replacement objects and submodule ignores, and rejects refs/replace, graft, and shallow metadata before graph or diff reads.

components.implementation_prompt: Implement BrokerService Allocate and Spawn through the frozen allocator and child-spawn DTOs: dedicated UIDs and namespaces, pre-bound public and broker listeners, direct cgroup-leaf placement, fixed pidfd attachments, zero initial-namespace capabilities, and FD-only delegation. Do not implement declarative emission.
baseline_call_graph: d2b-realm-core::LocalRootAllocatorEngine::allocate -> fake ledger and fake host observations only
d2b-priv-broker::live_handlers::{live_spawn_runner,live_open_pidfd} -> sys::pidfd_sys::{clone3_spawn_runner,pidfd_open}
d2bd::supervisor -> workload runner pidfd table; no paired realm-child authority
retirement_surfaces: no production Allocate or paired Spawn dispatch exists
no dedicated child UID, namespace, listener, cgroup-leaf, lease, or FD-only launch path exists

components.implementation_prompt: Replace the broker JSON/probe/Hello protocol with the authenticated d2b.broker.v2 service, strict generated requests and responses, typed attachment tables, close-once FD accounting, exact peer admission, cancellation, and existing audited operation backends. Delegate Allocate and Spawn to the allocator component.
baseline_call_graph: d2b-priv-broker::main -> runtime::parse_command -> runtime::run
runtime::run -> systemd fd 3 or bind_seqpacket -> accept4 -> recv_json_frame<BrokerRequestEnvelope>
runtime::dispatch_request -> live_handlers and ops -> send_json_frame_with_fds
protocol -> little-endian length-prefixed JSON seqpacket; fd_passing -> raw SCM_RIGHTS
retirement_surfaces: BrokerRequest and Hello JSON negotiation
layer1-bootstrap probe protocol and compatibility feature path
untyped JSON frame and response FD coupling

components.implementation_prompt: Migrate the CLI and local/direct/relay daemon access onto d2b-client and the frozen d2b.daemon.v2 generated client. Remove public_wire Hello, static/local read fallbacks, and specialized exec, shell, terminal, and broker clients; preserve fail-closed target and attachment handling.
baseline_call_graph: d2b::run -> NativeCli -> cmd_* -> DaemonConnection -> Hello -> public_wire request
d2b-daemon-access::LocalUnixDaemonAccess -> AsyncUnixSeqpacket -> Hello -> ListRequest
d2b-client::Client::connect -> TargetResolver -> HostSocketConnector -> SessionEngine -> ttrpc
DirectTlsDaemonAccess::connect and RelayDaemonAccess::connect -> UnsupportedFeature
retirement_surfaces: public_wire JSON Hello and semver feature negotiation
read-only daemon fallback to static manifest or local host state
specialized exec, shell, terminal, and broker client paths
declared remote transports that always return UnsupportedFeature

components.implementation_prompt: Serve d2b.daemon.v2 over authenticated local and remote ComponentSessions, route each generated method to the owned realm, guest, provider, broker, and allocator adapters, and delete the host-global JSON request switch, Hello negotiation, and specialized service branches.
baseline_call_graph: d2bd::main -> serve -> bind_public_socket -> accept worker -> dispatch_request
dispatch_request -> public_wire operation handlers -> broker JSON client or daemon subsystem
wire -> little-endian length-prefixed JSON seqpacket response
retirement_surfaces: public JSON Hello and feature negotiation
single host-global daemon request switch
specialized guest, realm, provider, and broker dispatch branches

components.implementation_prompt: Replace the guest shared-token HMAC Hello/Authenticate protocol and old generated guest-control service with d2b.guest.v2 bootstrap and vTPM-sealed static identity sessions. Migrate exec, cancellation, persistent shell, file transfer, shutdown, and named streams without chunked-unary or SSH fallback.
baseline_call_graph: d2b-guestd::main -> load token credential -> GuestdServeConfig -> serve_vsock
serve_vsock -> run_single_connection -> ttrpc GuestControlService
GuestControlService::hello/authenticate -> shared-token HMAC challenge -> capability, exec, shell, file, and chunked output RPCs
d2b-host::guest_control_token_materializer integration tests -> nixos-modules/guest-control-token-materialize.py -> long-lived host token materialization
d2b-host::guest_vsock_ttrpc_compile -> ttrpc::Listener::bind(vsock://-1:14318) -> direct unauthenticated transport shape
d2bd::guest_control_vsock -> GuestControlBridge -> old generated guest-control client
retirement_surfaces: guest-control token materializer tests and their pinned successor list
guest-control-token-materialize.py and guest-control-host.nix remain declarative retirement inputs owned outside this component
long-lived shared guest token and HMAC Hello/Authenticate
old guest-control generated bindings and protocol version
safe direct-vsock ttrpc compile proof for the retired listener
chunked unary stdio and specialized shell/file channels
no guest-generated static Noise identity sealed to vTPM exists

components.implementation_prompt: Implement the provider-agent process and all frozen d2b.provider.v2 service families using exact placement, generation, capability, deadline, cancellation, and credential co-location checks. Replace the gateway relay executables' specialized prologue path with the reserved d2b-provider-agent entrypoint and no bypass.
baseline_call_graph: d2b-gateway-runtime::agent_prologue -> specialized display HMAC frame
d2b-realm-provider -> pre-v2 provider trait facade
d2b-provider::RpcProviderProxy and placement checks exist only in the frozen provider foundation
retirement_surfaces: no live d2b.provider.v2 server or provider-agent process entrypoint exists
specialized gateway display prologue
production paths that bypass the frozen registry and RPC proxy

components.implementation_prompt: Implement d2b.realm.v2 controller bootstrap, enrollment, route resolution, shortcut authorization/revocation/close reporting, inspection, and cancellation over ComponentSession. Remove bare aliases, custom codec/version and HMAC handshakes, compile-only bypasses, and local-dispatch fallback.
baseline_call_graph: realm_access_resolver::resolve_local_root_realm_access -> metadata artifact -> direct local Unix binding
realm_stubs::ApiFrontend/TargetResolver/PeerOperationRouter -> compile-only skeleton not called by d2bd
d2b-realm-router::PeerSession -> custom length-prefixed semantic Handshake
d2b-gateway::SessionBinding -> specialized HMAC JSON display handshake
retirement_surfaces: bare-target alias and default-realm fallback
custom realm protocol version, codec handshake, and secure-session framing
compile-only realm facade bypassed by production
specialized shortcut and display handshakes outside ComponentSession
